series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Estimated Income Tax Payment Coupon for Estate and Trusts
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by Estates and Trusts to make estimated payments on a quarterly basis.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 6 months after scanned on ODT Info Image Systemt. ; Electronic: Maintained for 10 years via the ODT Info Image System, then erased., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
